ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a Todoist API token from Obsidian SecretStorage. The token value is not saved in plugin data.
ast.target: 从 Obsidian SecretStorage 中选择一个 Todoist API 令牌。令牌值不会保存在插件数据中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Todoist project used for new Obsidian #todoist tasks. Existing bridged tasks stay where they are.
ast.target: 用于新 Obsidian #todoist 任务的 Todoist 项目。已桥接的任务将保留在原处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: run lightweight sync while Obsidian is open. Off: sync only when you use Sync now. Mobile timers are best-effort.
ast.target: 开启：在 Obsidian 打开时运行轻量级同步。关闭：仅在使用“立即同步”时同步。移动端定时器尽力而为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: pull Todoist completions, reopens, label removals, and content updates into Obsidian. Off: Obsidian changes can still push, but Todoist changes are ignored.
ast.target: 开启：将 Todoist 的完成、重新打开、标签移除和内容更新拉取到 Obsidian。关闭：Obsidian 的更改仍可推送，但 Todoist 的更改将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Seconds between automatic sync runs. Minimum 20; mobile background timers are best-effort.
ast.target: 自动同步运行之间的间隔秒数。最小值为 20；移动端后台定时器尽力而为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: write detailed sync and diagnostics messages to the developer console. Off: keep logging minimal.
ast.target: 开启：将详细的同步和诊断信息写入开发者控制台。关闭：保持日志最小化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Dry-run scan. Writes a report only; does not change notes or Todoist.
ast.target: 试运行扫描。仅写入报告；不更改笔记或 Todoist。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies Todoist-confirmed completions and rebuilds verified open-task state. Review an audit first.
ast.target: 应用 Todoist 确认的完成状态并重建已验证的待办任务状态。请先审阅审计报告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Writes a sanitized diagnostics report without exposing the Todoist API token.
ast.target: 写入一份经过脱敏的诊断报告，不暴露 Todoist API 令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rebuilds local bridge state from unchecked #todoist task lines and Todoist verification.
ast.target: 从未勾选的 #todoist 任务行和 Todoist 验证中重建本地桥接状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Writes a Todoist backup JSON file into the vault.
ast.target: 将 Todoist 备份 JSON 文件写入保险库。
